skills.description: Safe first-task workflow for OpenAI Codex sessions in this repository: read local rules, scope the task, run checks, open a reviewable PR.
Turn a broad multi-step goal into a bounded, checklist-driven self-prompt and follow it to completion with hard stop conditions and an iteration cap.
Author a new skill bundle in this repository's skills/ package from a recurring task or an existing doc/prompt template.
Give the exact command to install a skill from this repository into Claude Code, Codex, or another agent harness.
